allow: Bash(find /usr /opt /home ~/Library -name "npm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10; find /usr /opt -name "node" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5)
Bash(ls /opt/homebrew/bin/ | grep -E "node|npm|pnpm|bun" 2>/dev/null; ls /opt/pkg/env/active/bin/ | grep -E "node|npm" 2>/dev/null; ls /opt/pmk/env/global/bin/ | grep -E "node|npm" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(ls /opt/homebrew/ 2>/dev/null || echo "homebrew not at /opt/homebrew"; ls /usr/local/ 2>/dev/null | head -20)
